Course Title: Using AI with Customer Data Safely
Who is this for: Customer service representatives, sales teams, account managers, marketing specialists, business analysts, client relationship managers, support staff, administrative assistants
Team or Dept this is for: Customer Service, Sales, Marketing, Operations, Legal, Compliance, IT
Description: Practical guardrails for handling client or customer information.
Prerequisites: Learners should have a basic familiarity with their organisation's data handling processes and a general awareness of what artificial intelligence tools are, though no technical expertise is required.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with using AI tools alongside customer data and explain the compliance considerations that apply in a corporate setting. You will also apply practical guardrails to ensure customer information is handled responsibly, helping you build safer and more trustworthy AI-assisted workflows.
